---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, metric, or integration
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

### Problem

A clear description of the problem you are trying to solve. "I want to …" is
a great way to frame it.

### Proposed Solution

Describe the change you would like to see — new endpoint, new metric, new
SDK method, new alert, etc. Include a sketch of the API surface if relevant.

### Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you considered, and why this one is better.

### Backwards Compatibility

- [ ] Backwards-compatible
- [ ] Breaking change (please describe the migration path)

### Additional Context

- Related issues, PRs, or external services
- Sample request/response payloads
- Diagrams, mockups, or screenshots

### Checklist

- [ ] I have searched [existing issues](https://github.com/sachncs/agent-passport/issues?q=is%3Aissue)
      for duplicates.
- [ ] I have considered how this interacts with the existing trust scoring
      algorithm, metrics, SLOs, and rate limits.
- [ ] I am willing to submit a pull request.
